meta.title: Meridian Estates — Prime addresses across the Emirates
meta.description: Discover prime residential property across Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Search by need with our AI matcher, estimate mortgages, and explore ready and off-plan homes.

footer.disclosure: Meridian Estates is a concept portfolio project built to demonstrate real estate web and AI patterns. Listings, pricing, agent profiles, and client reviews are illustrative and not affiliated with any real brokerage.

hero.subtitle: Precise, engineered property search for Dubai and Abu Dhabi — ready homes, off-plan opportunities, and investor-grade insight.

calculator.title: Mortgage & ROI Calculator
calculator.intro: Estimate a monthly mortgage payment and gross rental yield. Adjust the sliders — figures update live.
calculator.prefilledNote: Pre-filled with the price of the property you were viewing.
calculator.disclaimer: All figures are illustrative estimates for demonstration only and are not live bank rates, offers, or financial advice. The DLD 4% transfer fee reflects a public Dubai Land Department regulation. Confirm all figures with a licensed advisor.

mortgage.title: Mortgage estimate
mortgage.subtitle: Estimated monthly repayment for a UAE residential mortgage.

roi.title: Rental yield estimate
roi.subtitle: Gross rental yield based on price and expected annual rent.

about.title: A concept portal, engineered like a real one
about.body1: Meridian Estates is a concept portfolio project. It was built to demonstrate the web and AI patterns a modern UAE property portal needs — dense structured filtering, a structured-extraction AI matcher, real property detail pages, and interactive financial tooling — end to end and production-quality.
about.body2: Everything you see is designed the way a live product would be: precise, fast, accessible, and bilingual. The listings, developers, advisors, and reviews are illustrative, so the focus stays on the engineering rather than any specific inventory.
about.agentsSubtitle: Illustrative advisor profiles, each with a direct WhatsApp line.
about.disclosureBody: Meridian Estates is a concept portfolio project built to demonstrate real estate web and AI patterns. Listings, pricing, agent profiles, and client reviews are illustrative and not affiliated with any real brokerage.
